---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the situation, not just the feature.

## Proposed solution

How would you like this to work? Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives considered

Have you tried any workarounds? Are there other approaches that might work?

## Accessibility impact

Who benefits from this change? How does it affect screen reader users or other assistive technology users?
